# Andrii Kurshatsov

> Brand & product strategist and premium product designer partnering with founders to launch category-defining digital products. Bilingual site (Ukrainian / English).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, selected work, testimonials and contact.
- [About](/about): Background, approach and skills.
- [Services](/services): Brand strategy, product design and launch partnerships.
- [Work](/work): Selected case studies and product launches.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): What founders say about working with Andrii.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about engagements, scope and process.
- [Contact](/contact): Telegram, Instagram and contact form.
